title: Heavy rainfall, thundersquall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released | To read the entire bulletin issued by IMD | Inshorts - Inshorts
full_text:
Heavy rainfall, thundersquall and heatwave warning issued for several states, list released
The IMD has issued heavy rainfall warning over parts of Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Meghalaya, Nagaland, Manipur, Mizoram, Tripura, West Bengal & Sikkim for Monday (June 15). Thundersquall is very likely over parts of Rajasthan, Uttar Pradesh, Odisha and Madhya Pradesh. Meanwhile, dust storm is likely over parts of Rajasthan and heatwave is likely over parts of Maharashtra.
